description: This Dart source file defines the NotificationsScreen widget for a Flutter application, which displays a list of notifications in a styled list with options to mark notifications as read.

classes.name: _NotificationCard
classes.description: A widget representing a styled notification card with icon, title, message, and timestamp, handling tap interactions to mark notifications as read.

classes.name: _TypeChip
classes.description: A widget visualizing the notification type as a small colored badge with label.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the NotificationsScreen widget with a list of notification items, handling loading state.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the notification card widget, displaying notification details and handling tap to mark as read.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the notification type chip with appropriate color based on notification type.
